assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a terminal capable of running cURL or a documented SDK.
No Claude Console account, organization, payment method, usage credits, or API key exist yet.
The developer intends the direct Claude Messages API rather than claude.ai consumer chat alone.

developer_goal: Create a Claude Console organization, fund prepaid usage credits, create an API key, and complete the official Get started Messages API call.

first_success.outcome: The quickstart renewable-energy prompt is sent to the Claude Messages API and Claude returns an assistant message.
first_success.observable_signal: The response JSON has type message, role assistant, a text content block, stop_reason end_turn, and token usage; SDK routes print the equivalent assistant text.

route_selection.surface: Claude Console plus Get started with Claude
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete Console-to-first-Messages-call route only after signup UI fields and one client tab are fixed.

candidates.name: Console account + prepaid credits + API key + cURL Messages call
candidates.reason: cURL is the first documented tab with a full response example, but Console signup screens are unpublished and other tabs are equal clients.

candidates.name: Console + credits + API key + Python/TypeScript SDK
candidates.reason: Adds project scaffolding and package installs versus cURL without a named recommended default.

candidates.name: Anthropic CLI with browser OAuth
candidates.reason: Different authentication surface (OAuth vs API key export) reaching the same Messages outcome.

required_path.action: Create or log in to a Claude Console account and create or join a Console organization.

required_fields.label: Console identity and organization creation inputs
required_fields.notes: Support docs require a Console organization but do not publish the full signup UI sequence.

required_path.observable_result: The developer has an authenticated Console organization.

required_path.action: Fill out the requested organization and use-case information.
required_path.observable_result: Console allows the billing and credits flow to continue.

required_path.action: Enter payment details and purchase prepaid usage credits on the Billing page.
required_path.observable_result: The organization has a positive prepaid credit balance.

required_path.action: Create an API key in Console and store it securely.

required_fields.label: API key creation controls
required_fields.notes: Get started lists an API key prerequisite without publishing the key-form fields.

required_path.observable_result: A secret API key value is available.

required_path.action: Export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for the selected non-CLI client, or complete CLI auth login for the CLI tab.
required_path.observable_result: The selected client can authenticate to the Messages API.

required_path.action: Send the documented renewable-energy Messages request and verify the assistant response.

required_fields.label: Messages request payload or SDK call

required_path.observable_result: Claude returns an assistant message completing the quickstart call.

prerequisites.description: Access subject to Anthropic Commercial Terms of Service and regional availability.

external_gates.description: Prepaid usage credits must be purchased before API and Workbench usage.
Payment method and organization profile information are required to fund the account.

platform_outcomes.description: Purchased credits become immediately available on the Billing page.
The Messages API returns an assistant message with usage metadata.

excluded.item: Workbench experimentation beyond the first API call
excluded.reason: Get started terminal is the Messages API response, not Workbench UI exploration.

excluded.item: Custom rate limits or sales-assisted enterprise setup
excluded.reason: Documented as a contact-sales path after self-serve credits.

sources.title: How can I access the Claude API?
evidence_supported: Console account for keys and billing

sources.title: How do I pay for my Claude API usage?
I created a Claude Console organization: how do I start using the Claude API?

uncertainties.question: What exact identity, email-verification, and organization-creation screens does a brand-new Console user encounter?
uncertainties.impact: These screens can add steps or waiting before organization information and billing.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh Console signup walkthrough through organization creation.

uncertainties.question: Which Get started client tab is the canonical shortest route: cURL, CLI OAuth, or an SDK?
uncertainties.impact: Authentication surface and install steps differ while reaching the same Messages outcome.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: An official recommended client default, or an explicit workshop selection among the documented tabs.
